app.name: jcode
app.one_liner: A blazing-fast, fully autonomous AI coding agent with a gorgeous TUI, multi-model support, swarm coordination, persistent memory, and 30+ built-in tools - all running natively in your terminal.

screens.name: Main TUI Dashboard
screens.purpose: Primary interface for user interaction with the AI coding agent, displaying real-time progress, agent status, memory context, and tool outputs.

rust_commands.name: install_binary
rust_commands.purpose: Fetch and install the jcode binary using the install.sh script, handling platform detection and OAuth setup.

rust_commands.name: upload_demo_video
rust_commands.purpose: Upload demonstration videos (e.g., jcode_replay_jaguar_*.mp4) to releases or documentation as part of CI/CD or user onboarding.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add basic file and shell tooling
week 1: Build persistent memory store per session
week 1: Implement core TUI rendering engine targeting 1,400+ FPS
week 1: Integrate OAuth flow for Claude/ChatGPT/GitHub Copilot
acceptance_tests: Application starts instantly (<100ms) and uses <65MB memory during active session
Binary installs successfully via install.sh without 404 errors
Demo video uploads and displays correctly in README and release assets
TUI renders at >1,000 FPS with no flicker or lag under load
